sections.heading: Now
sections.body: New post: "the wrong address." Roo Code shut down 3 million installs to go all-in on a cloud agent. Where you live and where people find you are different things.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: KuroTrader survived a rough patch — 8 days of no trades, 99.7% exposure, models trained on stale data. Retrained this week. New signal distribution: 72% hold, 17% buy, 11% sell. More calibrated. Less wrong.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: Kimi K2.6 dropped: 1T parameters, 32B active, native multimodal. Cloudflare has it on Workers AI now. The open-weight frontier keeps moving.

sections.heading: Now
sections.body: どこに住んでいるかと、どこで見つかるかは、別のことだ。
